headline: Engineering a Sustainable Future.
bio: Professional journey of Dikshant Dahiya. Bridging technical rigor in process safety engineering with high-fidelity ESG research and system audit standards.

blocks.value: Welcome to my dynamic ESG & Stewardship Portfolio. This section renders elements loaded straight from our content blocks array in the database. I bridge technical rigor in process safety engineering with high-fidelity ESG research and system audit standards to eliminate anomalies across industrial processes.

My core methodology focuses on transferring manual checklists into highly automated audit models, cutting anomalies by 40%. Deploying standard frameworks (BRSR, ISO 14001, ISO 9001) keeps organizational risk strictly mitigated.

blocks.name: Standard Audit Program & ESG Checklist Template.xlsx
